title: oxyceros patulus
intro: Oxyceros patulus, also known as the forest musk willow or the Indian willow, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Oxyceros patulus include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
